name: Dutch Oven Hot Fudge Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the cake mix and fudge topping at home and pack them into ziplock bags for the camping trip.
2. Mix together the cake mix ingredients except the nuts.
3. Use a pastry cutter to cut the margarine into the dry ingredients until the consistency is that of a meal.
4. Add the nuts to the mixture after cutting in the margarine to make the process easier.
5. Place the mixture in a zip lock bag, squeezing out as much air as possible.
6. Mix the fudge topping together and put it into a zip lock bag, removing as much air as possible.
7. At the camp site, start the charcoal allowing about 12 coals for the bottom and 20 for the top.
8. Mix the cake mix with 1 cup of cold water and stir until the dry mix is moistened.
9. Put the cake batter on the bottom of the Dutch oven, spreading it level over the bottom.
10. Shake the fudge topping materials over the top of the batter, and carefully pour the hot water over the topping to wet it all.
11. Place the lid on the Dutch oven and bake for 45 minutes.
12. The cake rises up to the top, and the fudge sauce sinks to the bottom as it bakes.
13. Watch the bottom heat to avoid burning the bottom.
14. Cool to taste and eat.
